svg.title: YOLOv8n PPE & Vehicle Detection Training Pipeline
svg.desc: End-to-end training pipeline: Roboflow dataset → preprocessing → model selection → fine-tuning on client data → evaluation → deployment

g.text: Roboflow public dataset · 25-class PPE & vehicle annotations
Resize · augment · normalise · YOLO label format
Benchmark on NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1650 · COCO pretrained weights
7 classes: Hardhat · Mask · NO-Hardhat · NO-Mask · NO-Safety Vest · Person · Safety Vest
Precision · Recall · mAP@0.5 · mAP@0.5-0.95 · confusion matrix
